author: tkoxff
description: Visualize the local graph inline within your notes.

manifest.author: TKOxff <tkoxff@gmail.com>
manifest.description: Visualize the local graph inline within your notes.
manifest.name: Inline Local Graph

name: Inline Local Graph

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
### New Features
- **Max displayed nodes**: Added a setting to cap how many nodes appear in the graph. The active note is always shown and is excluded from the count; outgoing links are prioritized over backlinks. Entered as a number field (range 1–200, default 30) with out-of-range values clamped automatically.

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
### New Features
- **Separate label length for alphabet and non-alphabet languages**: Node label truncation now uses two independent limits — one for alphabet-based languages (default 20) and one for Korean/Japanese/Chinese labels (default 10) — so wide (full-width) characters no longer make nodes overly long. Added a new "Max label length (Korean/Japanese/Chinese)" slider.
- **Localized settings and UI (English, Korean, Japanese)**: The settings panel and graph controls are now translated based on the Obsidian display language, falling back to English for unsupported languages.

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
## New Features
- **Outgoing toggle**: Added toggle to the control bar to show/hide outgoing links
- **Show outgoing links**: Added corresponding setting to the settings panel

## Improvements
- Control bar labels renamed to **Outgoing** / **Incoming** for consistency with Obsidian's standard local graph terminology
- Refresh button (⟳) removed from control bar — frees up space, especially on mobile portrait mode
- `showGraphBorder` default changed from `true` to `false`
- Settings panel entries renamed to **Show outgoing links** / **Show incoming links**

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
## What's New

### Node Style Customization (closes #6)
- **Node shape**: Choose from Ellipse, Box, Circle, Dot, or Text only
- **Node font size**: Adjustable via slider
- **Label truncation**: Toggle on/off with configurable max length

### Settings Panel
- Reorganized into **Graph** and **Node Style** sections for clarity

## Code Improvements
- Removed unused code (`leaf` property, `nodeBgColor` class field, CSS rule)
- Deduplicated internal helper functions
- Removed all `console.debug` calls from production build

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
I've addressed the feedback from the Obsidian plugin reviewer.

### Feedback Improvements

* Updated the LICENSE file for the year 2026.
* **Cleaned Up Settings**: Removed unused/placeholder settings from the configuration.
* **Conditional Command**: The "Toggle the graph" command is now a conditional command. It will only appear in the Command Palette when a Markdown view is active.
* **Native Color Picker**: Replaced the text-based color input with Obsidian's native color picker in the settings tab for a more intuitive experience.
* **Better Link Resolution**: Added proper `sourcePath` handling when opening links from the graph, ensuring more reliable navigation.
* **API Optimization**: Refactored internal settings-saving logic to remove reliance on private plugin APIs, improving long-term stability.
releases.name: 0.9.6 - Address review feedback and UI improvements

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
Key Changes:

1. UI Text Formatting (Sentence Case)
2. Explicit Promise Handling
3. Command ID Optimization
4. Code Cleanup and Type Safety
releases.name: Fix issues reported by ObsidianReviewBot 25.12.25

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
Compliance with Obsidian Guidelines and Code Cleanup

Summary of Changes

- Guidelines: Verified no use of innerHTML or deprecated APIs.
- Refactoring: Renamed boilerplate MyPluginSettings to InlineGraphSettings.
- Type Safety: Removed any types; fixed MarkdownView | null assignment warning.
- Logging: Replaced all console.log with console.debug.
- UI Consistency: Standardized all UI text to Sentence case and updated tooltips.

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
- Moved styles from JavaScript to CSS classes.
- Add refresh button to InlineGraph controls for re-rendering
- Add initial zoom setting

releases.author: TKOxff
releases.description:
## Features

- Backlinks with transparency
- Exclude image file links.
- Disable zooming with mouse scroll and instead provide UI buttons for zoom control.

## Fixes

- Safely remove all children from the container in renderTo method
- Refactor inline graph component to use CSS classes for styling

releases.description:
Core feature
